steps.title: Rewrite in standard form
steps.content: The first equation becomes $48x-102y=24$. The second equation becomes $16x+ry=\frac{1}{6}$. For no solution, the $x$- and $y$-coefficients must be proportional but the constants must not follow that same ratio.

steps.title: Use the coefficient ratio
steps.content: The $x$-coefficient changed from $48$ to $16$, a scale factor of $\frac{1}{3}$. Apply the same factor to the $y$-coefficient: $$r=\frac{1}{3}(-102)=-34$$

steps.title: Confirm no solution
steps.content: The constants are not proportional because $\frac{1/6}{24}=\frac{1}{144}$, not $\frac{1}{3}$. So the lines are parallel and distinct. The answer is -34.
